MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CUSTOM EQUITY RESEARCH, INCS MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY LITIGATION. Appearances: David A. Thomas and Charles N. Freiberg of Kasowitz Benson Torres & Friedman LLP (421.6140) for plaintiffs and responding parties; Scott G. Lawson and Brian S. Sung of Greenberg Traurig (655.1270) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the court ruled as follows: claims are arbitrable as to individuals, but given the presence of everyone else in the case, the possibility of conflicting rulings make this an appropriate case to deny arbitration. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
